app.name: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to MIDI files

dropzone.title: Drop audio file here, or click to select
dropzone.subtitle: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A

mode.label: Processing Mode
mode.smart_tooltip: Direct full-mix transcription with either the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or the MIROS MusicFM challenge-SOTA route
mode.vocal_split_tooltip: Separate vocals/accompaniment with the TelkNet-aligned RoFormer vocal_rvc/karaoke ensembles, then transcribe both with the selected multi-instrument backend
mode.six_stem_split_tooltip: Separate bass / drums / guitar / piano / vocals / other stems, then transcribe and merge MIDI
mode.piano_transkun_tooltip: Use the dedicated Transkun piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_aria_amt_tooltip: Use the dedicated Aria-AMT piano model for pure piano audio
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_tooltip: Use ByteDance's pedal-aware piano model for pure piano audio
mode.smart_hint:
Transcribe full audio directly with either the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or MIROS MusicFM.
When MIROS is selected, the YourMT3+ model-mode selector is not used; output is GM multi-instrument MIDI.
mode.smart_yourmt3_hint:
TelkNet-aligned route: full mix -> selected official YourMT3+ checkpoint -> GM multi-instrument MIDI.
Use the model mode to choose noPS / PS / MoE checkpoint variants.
mode.smart_miros_hint:
TelkNet-aligned route: full mix -> MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder -> GM multi-instrument MIDI.
This is the first-place route from the 2025 AI4Musician Automatic Music Transcription Challenge; the model-mode selector is not part of this chain.
mode.vocal_split_desc: 🎤  RoFormer vocal_rvc/karaoke  —  Vocal Split + Separate Transcription
mode.vocal_split_hint:
Uses the TelkNet-aligned audio-separator RoFormer ensemble chain: vocal_rvc for vocals/accompaniment, then karaoke for lead/backing vocals. Separation itself does not use YourMT3+ / MIROS.
This app keeps the MIDI extension by transcribing vocals and accompaniment with the selected MIDI backend. Outputs two MIDI files by default; optionally adds one merged MIDI.
mode.six_stem_split_desc: 🎚  BS-RoFormer SW  —  Six-Stem Split + Separate Transcription
mode.six_stem_split_hint:
Exports six stem WAV files through the TelkNet/MVSep-aligned BS-RoFormer SW Fixed 6-stem route. Six-stem audio separation itself does not use YourMT3+ / MIROS.
This app keeps its MIDI extension by always writing six stem MIDI files plus one all_stems merged MIDI.
mode.piano_transkun_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Uses Transkun packaged pretrained resources.
mode.piano_aria_amt_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Expects the Aria-AMT checkpoint to be bundled or present in the model directory.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_hint: Best for pure piano audio. Preserves sustain pedal CC64; expects the ByteDance Piano checkpoint to be bundled or present in the model directory.

engine.label: Multi-Instrument Backend
engine.aria_amt_tooltip: Dedicated piano backend. SMART/VOCAL_SPLIT still use the multi-instrument backend; six-stem piano can prefer Aria-AMT.
engine.aria_amt_general_hint: Aria-AMT is the preferred piano backend; full-mix transcription still uses YourMT3+ / MIROS.
engine.aria_amt_six_stem_hint: In six-stem mode, the piano stem prefers Aria-AMT while other stems use the multi-instrument backend.
engine.aria_amt_with_miros_hint: Piano stem prefers Aria-AMT; multi-instrument passes use MIROS.
engine.dedicated_mode_hint: Dedicated piano modes use the selected piano model directly and skip the multi-instrument backend.
engine.yourmt3_tooltip: Official YourMT3+ Space / Colab-style route; the concrete checkpoint / architecture is controlled by the YourMT3+ model mode.
engine.yourmt3_midi_tooltip: This is only the post-separation MIDI backend; it does not perform vocal or six-stem audio separation.
engine.yourmt3_general_hint: TelkNet-aligned route: full mix -> selected official YourMT3+ checkpoint -> GM multi-instrument MIDI. Use the model mode to choose noPS / PS / MoE checkpoint variants.
engine.yourmt3_six_stem_hint: Six-stem audio separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. YourMT3+ is only the downstream Stem MIDI backend: it transcribes the full mix, then routes GM families to stem MIDI.
engine.vocal_split_yourmt3_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to the RoFormer vocal_rvc/karaoke ensembles. YourMT3+ is only the downstream MIDI backend for vocals/accompaniment; it does not perform audio separation.
engine.miros_tooltip: First-place system in the 2025 AI4Musician Automatic Music Transcription Challenge, using the official MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder route. Requires a local ai4m-miros checkout and runtime dependencies.
engine.miros_general_hint: TelkNet-aligned route: full mix -> MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder -> GM multi-instrument MIDI. This is the first-place route from the 2025 AI4Musician Automatic Music Transcription Challenge; the model-mode selector is hidden.
engine.miros_six_stem_hint: Six-stem audio separation is fixed to BS-RoFormer SW Fixed. MIROS is only the downstream Stem MIDI backend: it transcribes the full mix, then routes GM families to stem MIDI.
engine.vocal_split_miros_midi_hint: Vocal separation is fixed to the RoFormer vocal_rvc/karaoke ensembles. MIROS is only the downstream MIDI backend for vocals/accompaniment; it does not perform audio separation.
engine.yourmt3_model_tooltip: Official Colab-style YourMT3+ checkpoint / architecture selector. Missing checkpoints fail explicitly; model resources must be bundled or present in the model directory before running.

about.title: About Music to MIDI
about.description: Convert audio to editable MIDI files
about.author: Author

app.title: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to editable MIDI files

ui.audio_input: Drop audio file here, or click to select
ui.audio_hint: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A (automatically converted to WAV for processing)
ui.vocal_split_merge_midi: Output 1 merged vocal+accompaniment MIDI (vocal split mode)
ui.download_label: Click to download after conversion finishes

mode.smart_info: **Multi-Instrument MIDI** — Run full-mix AMT directly. Choose the official YourMT3+ checkpoint route or the MIROS MusicFM multi-decoder challenge-SOTA route; MIROS does not show or use the YourMT3+ model-mode selector.
mode.vocal_split_info: **RoFormer vocal_rvc/karaoke ensemble + MIDI extension** — Follows the TelkNet-aligned audio-separator vocal/accompaniment plus lead/backing-vocal chain; this app keeps post-separation MIDI transcription with the selected multi-instrument backend and optional merged MIDI.
mode.six_stem_split_info: **BS-RoFormer SW 6-stem + MIDI extension** — Audio separation follows the TelkNet/MVSep-aligned bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other route; this app additionally keeps MIDI generation with the selected multi-instrument backend and optional merged MIDI.
mode.piano_transkun_info: **Transkun (Piano)** — Dedicated transcription model for solo piano audio, directly outputs piano MIDI.
mode.piano_aria_amt_info: **Aria-AMT (Piano)** — Dedicated transcription model for solo piano scenarios. The Aria-AMT checkpoint is prepared on first use.
mode.piano_bytedance_pedal_info: **ByteDance Pedal (Piano)** — Pedal-aware transcription for solo piano audio. Preserves sustain pedal CC64.

error.upload_required: Please upload an audio file first

progress.yourmt3_vram_retry: VRAM is insufficient: initial batch={initial_batch}, lowered to batch={final_batch} and retrying
